resources.string: ROOM TEMPERATURE (set to match your thermometer)
UP / DOWN SWING — positions & sweep styles
LEFT / RIGHT SWING — control each vane group individually
Full state broadcast to AC — display and AC are now in sync
AC hardware can\'t split that combo — sending closest supported pattern (shown with ≈ on display)
No IR blaster detected — running in demo mode (animations only)
AC PROTOCOL — Walton uses different platforms; if the AC doesn\'t beep, tap FIND MY AC
Protocol set to %s — every button now transmits in this format

A TEST signal (power ON · 24°C) was just sent.

Format: %s

Did the AC beep or turn on?
Tip: hold the TOP edge of the phone pointed straight at the AC, within 4–5 meters. You can also verify the IR blaster works by controlling your TV with Xiaomi\'s Mi Remote app.
Protocol locked: %s. The whole remote now speaks your AC\'s language.

Every button press transmits the COMPLETE remote state (Gree-compatible protocol used by Walton split ACs), so the AC always matches this display. If the AC ever gets out of step (e.g. someone used the original remote), press SYNC once. IR is one-way: the AC cannot send its state back, so ROOM temperature is a display value you set to match your thermometer.
